_doc: World Zero — canonical faction-page data contract. Every faction page renders from ONE object of this shape. Fields are faction-agnostic; all per-faction decoration (charm/sticker/sigil, fonts, colors) is derived CLIENT-SIDE from `slug`, never stored here. The example values below are the Warriors of Whimsy instance.
name: Warriors of Whimsy

identity._doc:
Hero + About block. `motto` = short tagline. `blurb` = one-line hero sentence. `about` = manifesto paragraphs (render each as its own

).
identity.motto: A little magic, a lot of mischief.
identity.blurb: We make meaning from fragments — small acts of love, attention, and everyday enchantment.
about: Warriors of Whimsy is World Zero's coven for the soft and the strange. We believe the smallest gestures — a jar of moonwater, a secret name for a stray cat, a flower pressed and forgotten — are the real magic. Cut, paste, and conjure something whole.
There are no spectators here, only witches mid-spell. Take a quest, do the tiny brave thing, seal what you made as praxis, and let the circle cheer you on.

stats._doc: The four canonical hero stats, in display order. Every faction returns all four.

viewer._doc: Who is looking. `state` is one of 'prospective' | 'member'. Drives the Join/Leave block. When prospective: if `eligible` the Join CTA shows; else the `requirement` progress + encouraging message shows. When member: `role` populates and a Leave affordance shows.

requirement._doc: Only meaningful when state=prospective && eligible=false. `have`/`needed` render a progress bar; `summary` is the headline, `detail` the encouragement.
requirement.summary: Two quests away from an invitation
requirement.detail: Complete 2 more whimsy quests and the coven will open its circle to you. Keep going — the magic is in the doing.

openTasks._doc: Task-board preview (show ~4). id, title, description, level, points. `charm` is NOT stored — the whimsy client maps a sticker per card.

_items.title: The L Word
_items.description: Find someone you love. Tell them you love them.

_items.title: Moonwater
_items.description: Leave a jar of water out under tonight's moon. Drink it at dawn.

_items.title: Pressed
_items.description: Press a flower in a book you'll forget about. Find it again next year.

_items.title: Trade Secret
_items.description: Swap something small with a stranger. A button, a stone, a wish.

recentPraxis._doc: Completed-work feed (show ~3). Links task → finding. `endorsements` is the faction-neutral name for the social count (whimsy renders it as hearts).

_items.author: Pixie
_items.synopsis: Knocked on 4B, said it out loud, then took the stairs two at a time.

_items.author: m0th
_items.synopsis: Woke at 5:40. The water tasted like nothing and also like a secret.

_items.author: Sprite
_items.synopsis: A geranium leaf fell out of a library book I forgot I owned.

members._doc: Members block: one `isSpotlight` member gets the feature treatment, the rest render as a list/grid. id, name, role, level, points.
